response.global_analysis: This segment features a medley transition. 'Bunny Girl' is purely instrumental here. The vocals belong to 'Yami Yami' (by Hylen) and 'Cat Loving' (by Kashii Moimi). Since the reference JSON provided the wrong lyrics (Bunny Girl), I am ignoring it and transcribing the audio directly, confirmed by the on-screen song titles. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the energetic vocal bursts and stylistic singing.
